creator: kalinoj1@iem.pw.edu.pl
text:
After installing py-zsi I cannot use it in mod_python application under apache. That's beacuse 'www' user has no rights to access this file:


ls -al /usr/local/lib/python2.5/site-packages/ZSI-2.0-py2.5.egg
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel  421314  1 lis 21:05 /usr/local/lib/python2.5/site-packages/ZSI-2.0-py2.5.egg

Fix: 

I seems that port uses 'cp' instead of install to copy files, so it is affected by user's umask.
How-To-Repeat: /usr/bin/make -C /usr/ports/net/py-zsi install

Than try to 'import ZSI' in a mod_python application.
